evals.prompt: We have a Flutter screen that scans multiple barcodes at once using the mobile_scanner plugin (ML Kit). We want to replace it with Scandit MatrixScan Batch (BarcodeBatch) to track all visible barcodes. Here's the screen: MobileScannerScreen.dart. Migrate it and keep our deduplicated scanResults list.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads third-party-migration.md, removes the mobile_scanner plugin usage (MobileScannerController, the MobileScanner widget, onDetect, and the mobile_scanner import), and replaces it with a BarcodeBatch integration: BarcodeBatchSettings with the symbologies mapped from the mobile_scanner formats (BarcodeFormat.ean13 -> Symbology.ean13Upca, BarcodeFormat.code128 -> Symbology.code128, BarcodeFormat.qrCode -> Symbology.qr), a class implementing BarcodeBatchListener with didUpdateSession, a DataCaptureView with a BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay, and camera setup (Camera.defaultCamera + BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings() + setFrameSource). The _seen Set and scanResults list with the deduplication logic are preserved. It shows a setup checklist (packages, license key, camera permission) and a summary of what was removed and added.

assertions.text: The mobile_scanner import package:mobile_scanner/mobile_scanner.dart is NOT present in the rewritten code
MobileScannerController is NOT instantiated in the rewritten code (it may appear in a before/after summary table)
The MobileScanner widget is NOT used in the rewritten code (it may appear in a before/after summary table)
onDetect is NOT wired as a mobile_scanner callback in the rewritten code (it may appear in a before/after summary table)
Import from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_batch is present
Import from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode is present
BarcodeBatch( captureSettings ) constructor is used and dataCaptureContext.setMode( or _context.setMode( is called
A class implements BarcodeBatchListener and defines didUpdateSession(
Symbology.ean13Upca is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.ean13)
Symbology.code128 is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.code128)
Symbology.qr is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.qrCode)
Symbology.qrCode is NOT used as a Symbology value (the Scandit value is Symbology.qr) (semantic)
DataCaptureView.forContext( is used as the camera preview
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay( is added to the DataCaptureView
Camera.defaultCamera is used and BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is applied
_context.setFrameSource( or dataCaptureContext.setFrameSource( is called with the camera
The _seen Set and scanResults list are preserved with the deduplication logic (add to scanResults only when the value is new) (semantic)
The scanned values are read from trackedBarcode.barcode.data inside didUpdateSession (not from a mobile_scanner Barcode.rawValue) (semantic)

If both Scandit and a residual third-party BarcodeCapture name are in scope, the collision is disambiguated (import prefix or hide), or the mobile_scanner BarcodeCapture type is fully removed (semantic)
A setup checklist mentions adding scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode and running flutter pub get
The setup checklist mentions the camera permission (NSCameraUsageDescription on iOS and the runtime request on Android)
A summary of changes is shown listing what was removed (mobile_scanner) and what was added (BarcodeBatch)
